details: Compound 2a (1-pentafluorophenyl-1H-pyrrole-2-carbaldehyde) mp 77-79 °C verified verbatim in PMC6146868; DOI 10.3390/80700536 present in paper text.

The aldimine in the paper is prepared from cyclohexylamine + butyraldehyde (giving N-butylidenecyclohexylamine), not the row's N-benzylidene-2-ethylcyclohexylamine; bp 80-84 °C/20 mm Hg is for the wrong compound.
Compound 5j (3,5-Diamino-4-[(3,4-Dichlorophenyl)Diazinyl]-N-Tosyl-1H-Pyrazole-1-Carboxamide) mp 291-292 °C verified verbatim in PMC12943507 (DOI ph19020239 present).

The evidence quote concatenates Table 2 header tokens with the β=15 data row across multiple rows of the PDF table; the verbatim sequence is not a contiguous substring of the extracted text (Tp 297.99 itself is correct in Table 2).
Compound M9 (Bromophenyl/morpholinosulfonyl thiopyrimidine acetamide) mp 218-222 °C verified verbatim in khalifa_2024 HTML; DOI molecules29194778 present.

Paper labels compound 3a as the systematic name '(E)-6-(4-((tert-Butyldimethylsilyl)oxy)-6-methoxy-7-methyl-3-oxo-1,3-dihydroisobenzofuran-5-yl)-4-methylhex-4-enoic acid'; the row's 'Desilylated MPA analogue 3a' is a description that does not match the IUPAC name in the paper, though mp 122-124 °C and the serial code 3a are confirmed.
Compound 2d (3,3-Dichloro-4-(chloromethyl)-1-phenylpyrrolidin-2-one) m.p. 127-130 °C confirmed in diaba_2024 HTML; DOI molecules29092035 present 20+ times.

Ag(AN)(OTf) (4) synthesis paragraph with Tm: 148 °C verified verbatim in li_2025 PDF; DOI 10.1021/jacs.4c15317 and citation '5140-5148' present (the agent's self-flag claimed the HTML stub lacked content, but the PDF at paper_path does contain it).
Compound 5m (3,5-Diamino-4-[(Perfluorophenyl)Diazinyl]-N-Tosyl-1H-Pyrazole-1-Carboxamide) mp 203-204 °C verified verbatim in PMC12943507; DOI present.
m,p'-quaterphenyl (13) mp 163-166 °C verified verbatim in 2019_Johnson PDF; DOI 10.3762/bjoc.15.258 present.

Compound 5e (5-Methyl-4-((1-((1-(2-nitrophenyl)-1H-1,2,3-triazol-4-yl)methyl)-1H-indol-3-yl)methylene)-2-phenyl-2,4-dihydro-3H-pyrazol-3-one) mp 240-242 °C verified verbatim in PMC11843341; DOI acsbiomedchemau.4c00060 present.

The paper labels the 57-58 °C compound as 'Dicarbonylcyclopentadienyl(2-fluorophenyl)iron (2f)' — the ortho (2-)fluoro isomer; there is no compound 'Dicarbonyl(4-fluorophenyl)cyclopentadienyliron' (para) in the paper. The row's compound and label are wrong.
Compound 12 (O-(methyl)-2-((2-oxopropyl)selanyl)benzoate) mp 74-75 °C verified verbatim in PMC11206731; DOI molecules29122866 present.
Caledonixanthone G (8) melting point 201 °C verified verbatim in PMC6146543; DOI 70100038 present.
Disodium N,N-bis(diphenylphosphinomethyl)-2-aminoethylphosphonate (NaOH treatment of acid form) Mp >300 °C verified verbatim in PMC6236352; DOI 60400390 present.
Compound 5g (3,5-Diamino-4-[(4-Hydroxyphenyl)Diazinyl]-N-Tosyl-1H-Pyrazole-1-Carboxamide) mp 216-217 °C verified verbatim in PMC12943507; DOI ph19020239 present.
Compound M13 (Chlorophenyl/methylpiperazinylsulfonyl thiopyrimidine acetamide) mp 225-227 °C verified verbatim in khalifa_2024 HTML; DOI present.
Compound IV bis(2-nitrobenzylidene)-1,3-diaminopropane mp 68-70 °C verified in Table 1 of PMC13085778; DOI d6ra01520d present.
Tyrindoleninone red needles, mp 109.5 °C verified verbatim in PMC6236399; DOI 60900736 present.
Philinopgenin A (1) mp 208.5-208.5 °C verified verbatim in PMC3783257.
Allyl 1-hydroxy-1H-indole-2-carboxylate 2f mp 195-197 °C verified verbatim in PMC9188358; DOI s42250-022-00374-9 present.
N-Phenethyl-4-phenylpiperazine-1-carbothioamide (3c) White solid; 141.97 °C verified verbatim in PMC13084458; DOI acsomega.5c12576 present.
Compound M5 (Phenyl/thiomorpholinosulfonyl thiopyrimidine acetamide) mp 216-219 °C verified verbatim in khalifa_2024 HTML; DOI present.
5-octyldibenzo[b,f][1,7]naphthyridin-6(5H)-one (2a) mp 85.1-86.6 °C verified in nakanishi_2024 HTML; DOI bjoc.20.269 present 5x.

Compound 1c in Schmittel 2014 is the cyclohexylthiourea (mp 185 °C, 95% yield, C20H30N4S2 matches), but in the two-column PDF the label '(1c)' header and the 'White solid: mp = 185 °C' data lie in different columns; the row's verbatim concatenated quote does not appear as a contiguous substring in pdftotext output.
